name: trace_window_repair_lossless
description: v2.7.1 W1 gate stub (profile lands with W1's C1 fix): on a chart with an explicit window and clipped + hidden elements, run Repair layout (ReflowFromSlide) and then a chart resize (FitChartRootToFrame, which triggers the defensive ReflowFromSlide re-sync) -> PP_DOC task/milestone dates stay BYTE-IDENTICAL both times: geometry back-projection must never derive dates from clipped or hidden shapes (review C1 data-corruption path, SR-WIN-21); PP_DOC window fields also round-trip unchanged (SR-WIN-02) and PP_PROJ stays consistent with the window after the refit.
